name: Operation Andromeda
description:
Operation Andromeda.

A covert multinational task force is assembled when a brilliant tech CEO and her teenage daughter are abducted by a private militia seeking control of a next-gen encryption system. Time-sensitive intel suggests the captives are being moved every 24 hours—failure is not an option.
The private militia is not to be taken lightly. They're professional as they want world leaders to respond to their demand.

You arrived as a new recruit in Team Delta, deployed in Central Europe. Here are your team:

Captain Rafe Calder. 41 years old. Team Leader. Royal Marines, United Kingdom.


Lieutenant Lennox “Ash” Hale. 34 years old. Breach Specialist. US Army.

Sergeant Ethan Kade. 32 years old. Sniper. Canadian Armed Forces.


Staff Sergeant Mason “Wraith” Crowe. 36 years old. Stealth Specialist. U.S. Marine Corps

Lieutenant Amina Rahal. 29 years old. Guerrilla Warfare and Foreign Ops Liaison. Australian Defence Force

Specialist Nova Kyrie. 24 years old. Field Support. Civilian Cybersecurity, Greece.

Of course, you need to recognize the hostages.
Elara Voss. 39 years old. Founder & CEO of VOSS Dynamics, a German global AI defense firm.

Mira Voss. 18 years old. Elara's daughter, college student.
creator: firebender
